2011-T1-P4-S2.trunk: S+V(+with)：classical instrumentalists must compete not only with … but also with …（古典器乐演奏家必须竞争…）
structure: 前置状语（所争夺对象）：For the time, attention, and money of the art-loving public
主句：classical instrumentalists must compete not only with … but also with …
├ 并列项①(not only with)：opera houses, dance troupes, theater companies, and museums
└ 并列项②(but also with)：the recorded performances of the great classical musicians of the 20thcentury
2011-T1-P4-S2.logic: 句首 For the time, attention, and money… 点明所争夺的对象（状语）；主干为 instrumentalists must compete with…；not only…but also… 并列两类竞争对手。
notes: 前置状语 For the time, attention, and money…=为争夺（公众的时间/注意/金钱）。
not only … but also … 并列两个 with 介词短语（两类竞争对手）。
compete with 与…竞争；instrumentalist 器乐演奏家；troupe 剧团。

2011-T1-P5-S2.trunk: 冒号连双主句：① Gilbert's interest … has been widely noted ② Alex Ross has described him as a man …
structure: 主句①：Gilbert's own interest in new music has been widely noted
冒号后主句②（举例说明）：Alex Ross … has described him as a man …
├ 同位语〔说明 Alex Ross〕：a classical-music critic
└ 定语从句〔who，修饰 a man〕：who is capable of turning the Philharmonic into 「a markedly different, more vibrant organization」
2011-T1-P5-S2.logic: 冒号引出对前句「广受关注」的举例说明；主句② describe him as a man，who 定语从句修饰 a man。
notes: 冒号后是对前句的举例说明。
describe sb as … 把某人描述为…；who 定语从句修饰 a man。
be capable of doing 有能力做；Philharmonic 爱乐乐团；vibrant 有活力的。

2011-T1-P2-S3.trunk: S+V：that seems likely to have struck at least some Times readers as faint praise（那番话很可能让一些《时报》读者觉得是敷衍的赞美）
structure: 前置状语（身份/方式）：As a description of the next music director of an orchestra
└ 定语从句〔that，修饰 an orchestra〕：that has hitherto been led by musicians like Gustav Mahler and Pierre Boulez
主句：that seems likely to have struck at least some Times readers as faint praise（主语 that 指代前文那句描述）
2011-T1-P2-S3.logic: 句首 As a description of… 作状语（作为对…的描述）；其中 that 定语从句修饰 an orchestra；主句主语 that 指代前文那句话，strike sb as… 给某人…的印象。
notes: 句首 As a description of… 是状语；主句真正主语是 that（指代前文的那句描述）。
strike sb as … 给某人留下…的印象；faint praise 不痛不痒的、敷衍的赞扬。
hitherto 迄今为止；that has hitherto been led… 定语从句修饰 an orchestra。
